mapper.select: SELECT Q.QNA_NUM , MEM_ID , ITEM_NUM , QNA_DATE , CONTENT , REPLY_MEM_ID , REPLY_DATE , REPLY_CONTENT , CASE WHEN (SELECT count(REPLY_NUM) FROM reply WHERE QNA_NUM = Q.QNA_NUM) = 0 THEN '답변대기' ELSE '답변완료' END AS STATUS FROM qna Q LEFT OUTER JOIN reply R ON Q.QNA_NUM = R.QNA_NUM WHERE Q.QNA_NUM = #{qnaNum}

SELECT Q.QNA_NUM , MEM_ID , ITEM_NUM , QNA_DATE , CONTENT , REPLY_MEM_ID , REPLY_DATE , REPLY_CONTENT , CASE WHEN (SELECT count(REPLY_NUM) FROM reply WHERE QNA_NUM = Q.QNA_NUM) = 0 THEN '답변대기' ELSE '답변완료' END AS STATUS FROM qna Q LEFT OUTER JOIN reply R ON Q.QNA_NUM = R.QNA_NUM WHERE ITEM_NUM = #{itemNum}

SELECT Q.QNA_NUM , MEM_ID , ITEM_NUM , QNA_DATE , CONTENT , REPLY_MEM_ID , REPLY_DATE , REPLY_CONTENT , CASE WHEN (SELECT count(REPLY_NUM) FROM reply WHERE QNA_NUM = Q.QNA_NUM) = 0 THEN '답변대기' ELSE '답변완료' END AS STATUS FROM qna Q LEFT OUTER JOIN reply R ON Q.QNA_NUM = R.QNA_NUM WHERE MEM_ID = #{memId} ORDER BY QNA_DATE DESC
